prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约4297→4243→2873→4861→4438名，整体波动较大。2023年出现异常低位（2873名），2024年反弹至4861名后2025年回落至4438名，近两年呈后移趋势，2025年基准约4438名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年141人、2022年152人、2023年78人、2024年154人、2025年157人；2026年计划156人，较2025年微降1人（-0.6%），基本持平，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第10名（2021–2026），属于C9联盟顶尖高校，办学层次极高；2023年声誉偏负面（宿舍通勤问题），2024年偏负面（师德师风谣言已澄清），2025–2026年未见明显负面事件；抖音热度排名第24位（较热），综合热度184万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度稳定；拥有A+学科4个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科5个（力学、工商管理、数学、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A-学科3个（生物医学工程、电子科学与技术、管理科学与工程），工科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类、电子信息/通信、人工智能等专业均为高热推荐，社会热度持续升温；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.6%），竞争加剧；省控线2025年本科批436分，近年波动不大；西安交通大学位于陕西省（非本省），在广东省招生人数占该校全国总招生比例约3–5%，属于跨省招生，地域偏好上广东考生对省外顶尖985接受度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4438名、2026年招生计划基本持平、广东省物理类考生增加3.6%导致竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与王牌工科专业持续吸引高分考生等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约4471名，区间3971–4971名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4297 → 4243 → 2873 → 4861 → 4438, showing significant fluctuations. An abnormally low ranking occurred in 2023 (2873), rebounded to 4861 in 2024, then fell back to 4438 in 2025, with a backward trend in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 4438. The university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category: 141 in 2021, 152 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 154 in 2024, 157 in 2025; 156 planned for 2026, a slight decrease of 1 (-0.6%) compared to 2025, essentially flat, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 10th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for six consecutive years (2021–2026). It is a top-tier university in the C9 League, with an extremely high academic level. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues), in 2024 slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors, since clarified), and no significant negative events in 2025–2026. Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of 1.84 million, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and stable application attention. It has 4 A+ disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 5 A disciplines (Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 3 A- disciplines (Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering), with top-tier engineering strength nationwide, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Artificial Intelligence are all highly recommended, with continuously rising social popularity. In 2026, there are approximately 456,000 Physics Category examinees in Guangdong, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.6%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for 2025 undergraduate batch is 436 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (not local), with enrollment in Guangdong accounting for about 3–5% of its national total, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. In terms of regional preference, Guangdong examinees have a high acceptance of top-tier 985 universities outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4438, the essentially flat enrollment plan for 2026, a 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees leading to intensified competition, and the university's top-tier level and flagship engineering majors continuing to attract high-scoring students, the 2026 admission ranking is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4471, with a range of 3971–4971.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3971–4971, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Qian Xuesen Class/Top Talent Program) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 3971), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Electrical/Computer. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 4971), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category were approximately 1827 → 1785 → 1707 → 1530 → 1890, showing an overall forward trend (from 1827 in 2021 gradually rising to 1530 in 2024), but in 2025 it significantly moved back to 1890, a backward shift of about 360 places in the last year, with large fluctuations; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong: 9 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 8, a sharp reduction of 6 (-42.9%) compared to 2025, a significant enrollment cut, theoretically reducing competition pressure and moving the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university, ranked 10th in the Soft Science Ranking, a member of the C9 League, with an extremely high level of education, also attractive to liberal arts candidates; in 2023, reputation was slightly negative (dormitory issues), in 2024 slightly negative (teacher ethics rumors have been clarified), no significant negative events in 2025–2026; Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), overall exposure stable; among Xi'an Jiaotong University's liberal arts-related disciplines, Marxist Theory is A, Business Administration is A, Law is not separately rated, Foreign Languages and Literatures is not separately rated; liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Liberal Arts Experimental Class (including Philosophy, Sociology, Chinese Language and Literature), Foreign Languages and Literatures, Network and New Media, Public Administration, with moderate academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law recommended, Chinese Language/Literature recommended, Foreign Languages and Literatures generally wait-and-see, Public Administration; in 2026, Guangdong Province has about 326,200 History Category candidates, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for 2025 undergraduate batch is 464 points, a sharp rise from 428 points in 2024, reflecting overall intensified competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province, with very few History Category enrollments in Guangdong (only 14 in 2025, only 8 in 2026), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, small enrollment scale leads to sensitive ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1890, the 2026 enrollment plan significantly reduced by 42.9% (enrollment cut moves ranking forward), and the increase of Guangdong History Category candidates by 11.6% (intensified competition moves ranking backward), two opposing forces, the enrollment cut effect dominates but the candidate increase partially offsets; it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will significantly move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1434, with a range of 1262–1606.
